codeReview.summary: The fix correctly introduces an optional StatsSection override (`forceAggregatedData`) and wires CASH TokenDetails to always pass aggregated market/project data from the TDP store. This directly addresses the feature-flag gating root cause and preserves existing behavior for non-CASH call sites.

summary: Reviewed worker transcript skeleton and commit 19cf5f3. Implementation matches the feature requirements: Market cap, FDV, and 52W highs/lows are now sourced from CASH aggregated data while volume behavior remains intact. No correctness, security, maintainability, or regression issues were identified in scope.
